title: claude-agents sidecar manifest
description: Machine-readable index of the claude-agents catalog (ADR-0003). EXECUTABLY encodes the 7 retained ISO/IEC 25012 characteristics (ADR-0006): 5 FULLY covered by this schema — completeness, consistency, credibility, currency, compliance (enum `type`) — plus 2 SEEDED here through well-formedness (accuracy via a well-formed `id`, accessibility via anti-traversal `path`/`source.file`) then COMPLETED by integrity checks out of a JSON Schema's reach (accuracy: referential dependsOn -> existing ids + id uniqueness; accessibility: real reachability of path). See src/sidecar/integrity.ts. NB: the earlier '5 schema + 2 integrity' breakdown was inaccurate (compliance omitted, accuracy/accessibility split apart) — corrected following the ISO v1 quality audit.

schemaVersion.description: SemVer version of the sidecar format itself.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC generation timestamp. ISO 25012: currency.

assets.description: List of catalog assets (at least one). ISO 25012: completeness.

id.description: Unique asset identifier. ISO 25012: accuracy (well-formed). Global uniqueness is covered by a complementary test.

path.description: Relative path to the source prose file (no leading '/' or '..'). ISO 25012: accessibility (well-formed). Real reachability is covered by a complementary test.

catalogVersion.description: Catalog tag the entry originates from. ISO 25012: currency.

source.description: Audited provenance. ISO 25012: credibility — every machine entry traces back to a prose source + a tag.

dependsOn.description: Dependency edges (ids of other assets). ISO 25012: consistency. The existence of targets is covered by a complementary test (referential accuracy).
